name: 11L GPTQ-ActOrder + Int6 Bitpacking + Stride-32 SGD TTT
blurb: SGD TTT + GPTQ ActOrder + IZL + Int6 Bitpacking + Stride-32. 11 transformer layers, GPTQ with Hessian-sorted column ordering and block_size=256 (-0.003–0.004 BPB expected), 6-bit bitpacking (4 values→3 bytes, 25% smaller than int8), stride-32 TTT sliding window (vs SOTA stride-64, -0.001–0.002 BPB), TTT LR=0.002 matching proven SOTA recipe, zstd-22 compression. All params unfrozen during TTT. Built on PR #414 stack with Parallel Muon (PR #393) and Legal Score-First TTT (PR #461).
author: bochuandu
